tagline: Building thoughtful full-stack products with React, Django, Cloud and AI.
description: Full-stack developer and B.Tech IT student building reliable web products from database design through cloud deployment.

roles.detailed: React & Django Developer | Cloud & AI Enthusiast

bio: I am Mohamed Maahir, a third-year B.Tech IT student at SRM Institute of Science and Technology. I build end-to-end web products with React, Django, REST APIs and Docker, and have shipped live solutions for a college hospital and an NGO. My work moves comfortably from database design and useful interfaces to cloud deployment on AWS and Azure, with a growing focus on AI-powered experiences.

bullets: Built a real-time React and Vite chat application with responsive state handling.
Deployed web applications and REST APIs to AWS and Azure.
Contributed to an ML-powered autoscaling platform using Django, React, Docker and REST APIs.
experience.desc: Full-stack delivery, cloud deployment and practical infrastructure automation.

bullets: Worked hands-on with AWS and Azure compute, storage, networking and deployment services.
Deployed sample websites and web applications to live cloud environments.
Completed AWS Training Academy coursework alongside practical portal management.
experience.desc: Hands-on cloud foundations across deployment, infrastructure and web delivery.

projects.title: Dental Booking System
projects.subtitle: Live Hospital Management Platform
projects.desc: A live full-stack system for SRM College Hospital with patient booking, an admin dashboard, HOD analytics, live visualizations and downloadable case sheets.

projects.title: Anikum Karangal Portal
projects.subtitle: Live NGO Staff Management
projects.desc: A staff portal for an NGO covering attendance, salary, leave, increments and bonuses, backed by a Django API with clean Vite proxy integration.

projects.title: AI Chatbot
projects.subtitle: Ethical Conversational AI
projects.desc: An AI-powered chatbot built with a React client and Django REST API, designed with ethical AI principles from the Accenture Digital Skills program.

projects.title: 5G Vehicle Simulation
projects.subtitle: VIT Chennai 5G Hackathon
projects.desc: A 5G-enabled autonomous vehicle simulation with real-time API decisions, obstacle prediction and low-latency vehicle-to-cloud communication.

publications.title: Dental Booking System
publications.desc: Full-stack patient booking, admin operations and HOD analytics for SRM College Hospital.

publications.title: Anikum Karangal Staff Portal

publications.title: AI Chatbot

publications.title: 5G Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
